relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: A sea-beast rises with blasphemous authority.
A healed wound makes the world marvel.
Worship bends toward the beast and its source.
Boasting speech is given limited time.
The beast blasphemes Divine name and dwelling.
It wages symbolic war against holy witnesses.
Earth-dwellers worship what is not Lamb.
The holy ones answer with endurance and trust, not retaliation.
A land-beast mimics the lamb but speaks dragon.
It performs propaganda for the first beast.
Economic life is bound to allegiance.

contemplative_note: Revelation 13 unmasks empire and propaganda: the beast mimics sacred power, marks allegiance, and pressures economy, while holy wisdom refuses panic and target-making.
